sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَكُنِ الصِّدِّيقُ أَبُو بَكْرٍ -رَضِيَ اللهُ عَنْهُ- مُجَرَّدَ صَاحِبٍ لِلنَّبِيِّ ﷺ، بَلْ كَانَ تَجْسِيدًا حَيًّا لِلإِيمَانِ المُطْلَقِ الَّذِي لَا يَعْرِفُ التَّرَدُّدَ سَبِيلًا إِلَى قَلْبِهِ.
sentences.translation: Ebu Bekr es-Siddik, radijallahu anhu, nije bio samo ashab Vjerovjesnika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, već živo utjelovljenje apsolutnog imana u čije srce sumnja nikada nije pronašla put.
sentences.translationEn: Abu Bakr al-Siddiq (may Allah be pleased with him) was not merely a companion to the Prophet (peace be upon him), but a living embodiment of absolute faith that knew no hesitation.

sentences.arabic: فَمَوَاقِفُهُ العَظِيمَةُ فِي سِيرَةِ الإِسْلَامِ تُرْسِمُ لَنَا مَعَالِمَ التَّضْحِيَةِ الفِدَائِيَّةِ الَّتِي تَتَجَاوَزُ حُدُودَ الذَّاتِ.
sentences.translation: Njegovi veliki stavovi u historiji islama crtaju nam obrise požrtvovanosti koja prevazilazi granice sebstva.
sentences.translationEn: His great stances in the history of Islam outline for us the landmarks of sacrificial devotion that transcends the boundaries of the self.

sentences.arabic: فَعِنْدَمَا عَزَمَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ عَلَى الهِجْرَةِ، كَانَ أَبُو بَكْرٍ هُوَ الرَّفِيقَ الَّذِي اخْتَارَهُ اللهُ لِيُؤْنِسَ وَحْشَتَهُ فِي الغَارِ.
sentences.translation: Kada je Vjerovjesnik odlučio učiniti Hidžru, Ebu Bekr je bio saputnik kojeg je Allah odabrao da mu ublaži usamljenost u pećini.
sentences.translationEn: When the Prophet intended to migrate, Abu Bakr was the companion chosen by Allah to soothe his loneliness in the cave.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ سَطَّرَ التَّارِيخُ بِأَحْرُفٍ مِنْ نُورٍ مَقَالَتَهُ المَشْهُورَةَ حِينَ خَافَ عَلَى سَلَامَةِ الرَّسُولِ ﷺ، فَطَمْأَنَهُ النَّبِيُّ بِعَظَمَةِ المَعِيَّةِ الإِلَهِيَّةِ. [أَخْرَجَهُ البُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ مَنَاقِبِ الأَنْصَارِ].
sentences.translation: Historija je slovima od svjetlosti zapisala njegove čuvene riječi kada se bojao za sigurnost Poslanika, pa ga je on umirio veličinom Božijeg prisustva. [Zabilježio Buhari u Knjizi o vrlinama ensarija].
sentences.translationEn: History has recorded in letters of light his famous words when he feared for the Prophet's safety, only for the Prophet to reassure him with the greatness of Divine presence. [Reported by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Virtues of the Ansar].

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ هَذِهِ الصُّحْبَةَ لَمْ تَكُنْ نُزْهَةً، بَلْ كَانَتْ مِحْنَةً كَشَفَتْ عَنْ مَعْدِنِ الرِّجَالِ الأَوْفِيَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ovo druženje nije bilo izlet, već iskušenje koje je otkrilo suštinu lojalnih ljudi.
sentences.translationEn: This companionship was not a stroll, but an ordeal that revealed the metal of loyal men.

sentences.arabic: فَقَدْ بَذَلَ الصِّدِّيقُ مَالَهُ كُلَّهُ لِنُصْرَةِ الدِّينِ، وَلَمْ يَبْقَ لِأَهْلِهِ إِلَّا حُبَّ اللهِ وَرَسُولِهِ.
sentences.translation: Siddik je dao sav svoj imetak za potpomaganje vjere, ostavljajući svojoj porodici samo ljubav prema Allahu i Njegovom Poslaniku.
sentences.translationEn: Al-Siddiq spent all his wealth to support the religion, leaving nothing for his family except the love of Allah and His Messenger.

sentences.arabic: وَهَذَا المَنْهَجُ فِي البَذْلِ يَعْكِسُ عَقِيدَةً رَاسِخَةً تَرَى الآخِرَةَ رَأْيَ العَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj pristup davanju odražava čvrstu akidu koja onaj svijet vidi kao na dlanu.
sentences.translationEn: This approach to giving reflects a firm creed that sees the Hereafter as if with one's own eyes.

sentences.arabic: وَلَمْ تَتَوَقَّفْ مَنَاقِبُهُ عِنْدَ هَذَا الحَدِّ، بَلْ كَانَ أَوَّلَ مَنْ صَدَّقَ بِرِحْلَةِ الإِسْرَاءِ وَالمِعْرَاجِ دُونَ أَدْنَى شَكٍّ، مِمَّا أَهَّلَهُ لِلَقَبِ «الصِّدِّيقِ».
sentences.translation: Njegove vrline se nisu tu zaustavile; on je bio prvi koji je bez imalo sumnje povjerovao u Isru i Mi'radž, što mu je donijelo nadimak 'es-Siddik' (Istinoljubivi).
sentences.translationEn: His virtues did not stop there; he was the first to believe in the journey of Isra and Mi'raj without the slightest doubt, qualifying him for the title 'Al-Siddiq.'

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ دِرَاسَةَ حَيَاةِ أَبِي بَكْرٍ تُعَلِّمُنَا أَنَّ الإِيمَانَ لَيْسَ بِالتَّمَنِّي، وَلَكِنْ مَا وَقَرَ فِي القَلْبِ وَصَدَّقَهُ العَمَلُ.
sentences.translation: Proučavanje života Ebu Bekra uči nas da iman nije u pustim željama, već u onome što se ugnijezdi u srcu i što djela potvrde.
sentences.translationEn: Studying the life of Abu Bakr teaches us that faith is not by wishful thinking, but what is settled in the heart and verified by actions.

sentences.arabic: فَقَدْ كَانَ سَبَّاقًا لِلْخَيْرَاتِ، لَا يُنَافِسُهُ فِيهَا أَحَدٌ إِلَّا وَبَزَّهُ.
sentences.translation: Uvijek je prednjačio u dobrim djelima, i ko god bi mu pokušao parirati, on bi ga nadmašio.
sentences.translationEn: He was always a pioneer in good deeds, and whoever competed with him was surpassed.

sentences.arabic: وَمِنْ هُنَا، يَنْبَغِي لِلْمُسْلِمِ اليَوْمَ أَنَّ يَسْتَلْهِمَ مِنْ ثَبَاتِهِ فِي المِحَنِ وَقُوَّةِ عَزِيمَتِهِ فِي نَشْرِ الحَقِّ.
sentences.translation: Otuda današnji musliman treba crpiti inspiraciju iz njegove postojanosti u iskušenjima i snage njegove odlučnosti u širenju istine.
sentences.translationEn: Hence, the Muslim today should draw inspiration from his steadfastness in trials and the strength of his resolve in spreading the truth.

sentences.arabic: فَالصِّدِّيقُ بَقِيَ مَنَارَةً تَهْتَدِي بِهَا الأَجْيَالُ فِي كَيْفِيَّةِ الجَمْعِ بَيْنَ الرِّقَّةِ فِي التَّعَامُلِ وَالصَّلَابَةِ فِي المَبَادِئِ.
sentences.translation: Siddik ostaje svjetionik generacijama u tome kako spojiti blagost u ophodnji i čvrstinu u principima.
sentences.translationEn: Al-Siddiq remains a lighthouse guiding generations on how to combine tenderness in interaction with firmness in principles.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّهُ النَّمُوذَجُ الأَمْثَلُ لِلْخَلِيفَةِ الرَّاشِدِ الَّذِي حَفِظَ كِيَانَ الأُمَّةِ بَعْدَ وَفَاةِ نَبِيِّهَا ﷺ بِحِكْمَةٍ وَبَصِيرَةٍ نَافِذَةٍ.
sentences.translation: On je savršen model pravednog halife koji je mudrošću i prodornom pronicljivošću sačuvao biće ummeta nakon smrti njenog Poslanika.
sentences.translationEn: He is the ideal model of the Rightly Guided Caliph who preserved the entity of the Ummah after the death of its Prophet with wisdom and penetrating insight.
